title: chrysothamnus nauseosus subsp. leiospermus
intro: Chrysothamnus nauseosus subsp. leiospermus, also known as rubber rabbitbrush, is a shrubby plant native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Chrysothamnus nauseosus subsp. leiospermus include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
